title: base_url with query/fragment accepted but produces malformed downstream URLs
description: Trigger: JmapChatClient::new(auth, "https://host?foo=1") or JmapChatClient::new(auth, "https://host#frag"). The validator checks only path (which is "/" in both cases) and accepts the URL. The raw string is then stored and used as a base for all downstream requests. fetch_session constructs "https://host?foo=1/.well-known/jmap" or "https://host#frag/.well-known/jmap", which are malformed URLs — the query string or fragment is not part of the origin. The fix is to also reject base_url strings whose parsed URL has a non-empty query or non-empty fragment.
